mapper.select: SELECT p.PLACE_TYPE, p.NAME, p.ADDRESS, p.VIEW_COUNT, p.IMAGE_URL, COUNT(rv.REVIEW_ID) AS REVIEW_COUNT FROM PLACE p LEFT JOIN REVIEW rv ON p.PLACE_ID = rv.PLACE_ID WHERE (name LIKE '%'||#{keyword}||'%' OR address LIKE '%'||#{keyword}||'%') GROUP BY p.PLACE_ID, p.PLACE_TYPE, p.NAME, p.ADDRESS, p.VIEW_COUNT, p.IMAGE_URL, p.CREATED_AT ORDER BY p.VIEW_COUNT DESC

SELECT f.FESTIVAL_ID , TO_CHAR(f.DESCRIPTION) AS DESCRIPTION , f.START_DATE , f.END_DATE , f.STATUS , p.PLACE_TYPE , p.NAME , p.ADDRESS , p.VIEW_COUNT , p.IMAGE_URL , COUNT(rv.REVIEW_ID) AS REVIEW_COUNT FROM FESTIVAL f INNER JOIN PLACE p ON f.FESTIVAL_ID = p.PLACE_ID LEFT JOIN REVIEW rv ON p.PLACE_ID = rv.PLACE_ID WHERE (p.NAME LIKE '%'||#{keyword}||'%' OR p.address LIKE '%'||#{keyword}||'%') GROUP BY f.FESTIVAL_ID , TO_CHAR(f.DESCRIPTION) , f.START_DATE , f.END_DATE , f.STATUS , p.PLACE_TYPE , p.NAME , p.ADDRESS , p.VIEW_COUNT , p.IMAGE_URL ORDER BY p.VIEW_COUNT DESC

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM PLACE p WHERE (p.NAME LIKE '%'||#{keyword}||'%' OR p.ADDRESS LIKE '%'||#{keyword}||'%')
AND p.PLACE_TYPE = #{type}
